description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 7/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests for multi-turn behavior and session reuse.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Added provider-free multi-turn session coverage. The test verifies repeated Jidoka.chat/3 calls through one session reuse the same runtime agent, preserve merged session/per-turn context, produce distinct request IDs, retain both request records, and expose traces for each turn.

title: E2: Add tests for multi-turn behavior and session reuse
